sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64916" key="mani/a2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μανία</orth> (B), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64916.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μανότης</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.393</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
